summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard; no shared canonical was provided, so 39 hydrated open non-security PRs are kept independent. #88875 is downgraded to needs_human because the deterministic validator demanded route_security while the hydrated preflight artifact explicitly marks #88875 security_sensitive=false, which is authoritative for this run and cannot be overridden by check names or validator wording. No close/merge/fix/label mutation is planned.

needs_human: #88875: deterministic validator reported security-sensitive target must use route_security, but hydrated preflight artifact explicitly has security_sensitive=false and security_sensitive_items=[]; security repair rule forbids route_security for this exact hydrated ref without security_sensitive=true.
